description: FutSpring Profile — view and edit user profile (avatar, background image, username, position, stars), display global stats and Puskas award history, image uploads

userStories.title: Backend profile endpoints — get, update, and file serving
userStories.description: As a developer, I need endpoints to retrieve and update user profile info and serve uploaded files.
acceptanceCriteria: Ensure User entity has fields: image (String, nullable), backgroundImage (String, nullable), stars (int, default 3), position (String, nullable — store as String for simplicity, not enum, valid values: GOALKEEPER, DEFENDER, MIDFIELDER, FORWARD); add backgroundImage if missing
Create ProfileDTO with fields: id, username, email, image, backgroundImage, stars, position; static ProfileDTO.from(User u) factory
GET /api/v1/users/:id — any authenticated user; returns ProfileDTO; 404 if not found; add to UserController

PUT /api/v1/users/:id — authenticated user can only update own profile (403 if mismatch); body: UpdateProfileRequest { username (optional, min 3 max 30), position (optional, must be one of the 4 allowed values or null), stars (optional, 1–5) }; return 409 if username taken by another user; return updated ProfileDTO

Serve uploaded files: configure Spring MVC to serve files from uploads/ directory under /api/v1/files/**; use ResourceHttpRequestHandler or WebMvcConfigurer.addResourceHandlers(); files stored via existing upload endpoints (pelada images, champion images, user images) are all in the same uploads/ dir
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Backend avatar and background image upload endpoints
userStories.description: As a developer, I need endpoints to upload and replace a user's avatar and background image.
acceptanceCriteria: POST /api/v1/users/:id/image — multipart/form-data; authenticated user can only upload own image (403 if mismatch); accept JPEG/PNG/WebP only (check content type); max 5MB; store under uploads/ with UUID prefix; update user.image; delete old file from disk if it was previously set; return updated ProfileDTO
POST /api/v1/users/:id/background-image — same constraints as avatar upload; update user.backgroundImage; delete old background file if previously set; return updated ProfileDTO
Both endpoints return 400 for invalid file type or size
Add both endpoints to UserController; add uploadUserImage(id, file, email) and uploadBackgroundImage(id, file, email) methods to UserService (or a new ImageService)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Frontend Profile page — full display with avatar, background, position, stars
userStories.description: As a user, I want to view my profile (and other users' profiles) with all identity info, stats, and awards displayed.
acceptanceCriteria: Add ProfileDTO interface to src/types/user.ts (or src/types/profile.ts): { id, username, email, image, backgroundImage, stars, position }
Add getUser(userId) API function to src/api/users.ts using existing Axios client
Update ProfilePage to fetch both getUser(userId) and getUserStats(userId) in parallel (Promise.all or separate useEffects)

Profile page layout: background image spanning full width as a header banner (200px tall); if no backgroundImage, show a gradient fallback; avatar image overlapping the bottom of the banner (circular, 96px, border); below: username in large text, position as a colored badge (GOALKEEPER=green, DEFENDER=blue, MIDFIELDER=yellow, FORWARD=red — use text or short label), stars as filled/empty star icons (★/☆) 1–5
Image URLs: if image/backgroundImage is set, load from /api/v1/files/{filename}; if null, show initials avatar / gradient fallback
Stats section (already built): goals, assists, matches, wins cards — keep existing implementation
Puskas award history section (already built): keep existing implementation
Stats chart (already built): keep existing BarChart
'Edit Profile' button visible only when profileId === currentUser.id (use useAuth().user.id)
Skeleton loading while either getUser or getUserStats is loading
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Frontend Edit Profile modal — update info and upload images
userStories.description: As a user, I want to edit my username, position, stars, avatar, and background image from my profile page.
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking 'Edit Profile' opens an edit modal

Modal fields: username (text input, pre-filled), position (select with options: GOALKEEPER, DEFENDER, MIDFIELDER, FORWARD, and a blank option for 'No position'), stars (number input or star-picker, 1–5)
Avatar upload: clicking the avatar in the modal opens file picker; on file select calls POST /users/:id/image immediately and updates preview on success
Background image upload: clicking the background area in the modal opens file picker; on file select calls POST /users/:id/background-image immediately and updates preview on success
Save button calls PUT /users/:id with username/position/stars values; on success: close modal, update displayed profile in place (setUser(updatedProfile)), show success toast
If PUT returns 409 (username taken): show inline error below username input; modal stays open
Image upload errors shown as error toast; modal stays open on upload error
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Stats chart and Puskas history already implemented
userStories.description: The Recharts BarChart (goals vs assists) and Puskas award history section were implemented in the Stats & Rankings cycle. Marking complete.
acceptanceCriteria: Already implemented: Recharts BarChart with goals and assists bars on ProfilePage
Already implemented: Puskas award history section with dates sorted most-recent-first and empty state
